Require Ownership Proof Above
fields.description: Orders above this amount need a purchase invoice / ownership document, not just buyer ID (KYC proves who the seller is, not that they own this device). Set to 0 to never require it.

fields.label: Auto-Expire Quotes
fields.description: Automatically expire quotes past validity period
Maximum split-payment rows allowed on one Buyback Order.
fields.label: Maximum Payment Rows
Enable Split Payment
fields.description: Allow splitting payment across multiple methods

fields.label: Default Bank Profile
fields.description: Bank Integration Profile used for auto-creating Bank Payment Requests on Buyback payout. Overrides Bank Integration Settings default.

fields.description: Liability account cleared when buyback value is applied as exchange credit on a new sale.
fields.label: Buyback Liability Account
Enable Loyalty Points
fields.description: Award loyalty points to customers on buyback completion

fields.label: Points per ₹100
fields.description: Number of loyalty points awarded per ₹100 of buyback value

fields.label: Point Expiry (Days)
fields.description: Days after which earned loyalty points expire

fields.label: Buyback Bin Warehouse
fields.description: Central buyback bin (e.g. Buyback Bin - BMPL). Bought-back devices are auto-routed here from the store via a Material Transfer Material Request.

fields.label: Auto-Create Pickup Material Request
fields.description: DEFAULT OFF (logistics redesign): store staff raise the pickup Material Request manually from the Buyback Order. Enable only if you want the legacy auto-creation behaviour.
Maximum failed or scheduled pickup attempts before an exception must be raised.
fields.label: Maximum Pickup Attempts
Notify Pickup Role
fields.description: Users with this role get a Notification + ToDo when a buyback pickup Material Request is created. Defaults to Stock Manager when blank.

fields.label: Require Buyback-Enabled Store
fields.description: When ON (market-standard: Cashify / Samsung / Apple Trade In), all buyback intake APIs (assessment, order, pickup) refuse to run unless the target Warehouse has ch_is_buyback_enabled = 1. Turn OFF only for pilot rollouts where every warehouse is transient.

fields.label: Compliance Gates (Phase B)
fields.description: Market-standard gates that must be satisfied before a buyback device can be paid out and released to refurb / resale.

fields.label: Require Indemnity / NOC Before Paid
fields.description: Cannot mark a Buyback Order Paid unless a customer NOC / indemnity has been captured (Cashify / Samsung / Best Buy pattern). Turn OFF only for pilots.

fields.label: Require Data-Wipe Certificate Before Restock
fields.description: Refurbishment Orders derived from a Buyback Order cannot transition to Restocked without a submitted CH Data Wipe Certificate. Legal / privacy standard across Apple Trade In, Samsung Exchange, Best Buy Trade-In.
Maximum documents processed by one Buyback scheduler invocation.
fields.label: Scheduler Batch Limit

fields.description: Maximum characters accepted in a public Buyback request payload.
fields.label: Public Payload Maximum Characters

fields.description: Maximum assessment response rows accepted from the public portal.
fields.label: Public Response Row Limit
